intent: In DATA_DIR there is a 10x matrix triplet for one PBMC sample — files prefixed GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1. Run a standard Seurat workflow in R: load, QC, normalize, PCA, neighbors, clustering, UMAP, and FindAllMarkers; show me a UMAP and the top markers per cluster.

blocks.text: Good — I can see the 10x data. There are actually three samples here, but you asked for the first one: **GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1**. Let me read the Seurat recipe and plan the workflow.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "seurat-scrna", "description": "Authoritative single-cell RNA-seq QC + clustering + cluster annotation with R/Seurat (v5).", "body": "scRNA-seq QC + clustering + annotation with R/Seurat v5 (standard PBMC3k workflow). Provision: ensure_capability('Seurat'), then library(Seurat). THE THREE CHOICES THAT DEFINE THE RESULT \u2014 surface them with present_plan before committing: (1) QC thresholds (subset cutoffs on nFeature_RNA and percent.mt); (2) number of PCs/dims (read off the ElbowPlot); (3) clustering resolution (FindClusters). Steps: ReadMtx -> CreateSeuratObject(min.cells=3,min.features=200) -> PercentageFeatureSet('^MT-') -> subset QC -> NormalizeData -> FindVariableFeatures -> ScaleData -> RunPCA -> FindNeighbors -> FindClusters -> RunUMAP -> JoinLayers -> FindAllMarkers. Load ggplot2 and dplyr explicitly; never library(tidyverse)."}

blocks.text: Now let me present a plan for the workflow:

input.title: Seurat v5 QC + Clustering + FindAllMarkers for GSM5746268
input.summary: Load the 10x matrix triplet, run standard Seurat QC/normalization/PCA/clustering, produce UMAP and top markers per cluster.

steps.title: Load 10x matrix triplet and create Seurat object
steps.description: Read barcodes, features, and matrix files; create object with min.cells=3, min.features=200

steps.title: QC: Calculate percent.mt and inspect distributions
steps.description: Add PercentageFeatureSet for MT genes; plot nFeature, nCount, percent.mt to decide thresholds

steps.title: QC-based subset (apply thresholds)
steps.description: Subset object based on nFeature_RNA and percent.mt cutoffs

steps.title: Normalize, HVG, Scale, PCA
steps.description: NormalizeData → FindVariableFeatures → ScaleData → RunPCA with elbow plot
expected_outputs: PCA reduction; elbow plot to guide PC selection

steps.title: UMAP visualization
steps.description: RunUMAP on first N PCs; plot by cluster

steps.title: Find and summarize cluster markers
steps.description: JoinLayers + FindAllMarkers; extract top N per cluster
expected_outputs: Marker table (top genes per cluster); summary table

assumptions: Using GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1 only (the first sample provided)
Standard QC thresholds: nFeature_RNA 200–5000, percent.mt < 10 (adjust after seeing distributions)
Using first 30 PCs (standard; can refine with elbow plot)
Gene names for MT detection: Mouse genes starting with 'mt-' or 'MT-' (will verify from features file)
